betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Watz Powerplant§f is a pebble-bed reactor producing §bPoisonous Mud§f for CMB Steel.

§eTask Requirements:§f
• §bBolts§f (192x)
• §bWatz Elements§f (36x)
• §bWatz Coolers§f (26x)
• §bWatz Core§f
• §bWatz Pump§f
• §bBoltgun§f

§eUnique Output:§f
Produces §bPoisonous Mud§f - the §aonly source§f for §bCMB Steel§f production!

§eWhy Build Watz:§f
CMB Steel (Cosmic Microwave Background Steel) is required for ultimate end-game equipment. No other reactor produces Poisonous Mud.

§eOperation:§f
• Pebble-bed design with graphite moderators
• Coolers manage temperature
• Pump circulates coolant

§aTip:§f This is primarily built for CMB Steel access, not power generation.
